content_body:
Specializing in guided fly fishing trips, Cohutta Fishing Company offers access to some of the region's most pristine and productive fishing waters, including the Toccoa River, Noontootla Creek, and other hidden gems.

Their experienced guides are passionate about fishing and eager to share their expertise, providing personalized instruction and insights into local fish behavior and techniques.

In addition to guided trips, Cohutta Fishing Company boasts a well-stocked shop in downtown Blue Ridge featuring a wide selection of premium fly fishing gear, apparel, and accessories from leading brands.

Whether you need to upgrade your equipment, stock up on flies, or seek advice on the best fishing spots, the friendly and knowledgeable staff are always ready to assist.
title: Cohutta Fishing Company
